name: Truffled Sous Vide Eggs Benedict with Smoked Salmon, Hollandaise Espuma & Ossetra Caviar
description: An ultra-luxurious brunch dish featuring precision sous-vide eggs, a weightless truffle hollandaise espuma, elegant smoked salmon rosettes, and a crowning of Ossetra caviar. Contrasting temperatures and textures create a three-star experience at home.
keywords: eggs benedict, sous vide, truffle, caviar, hollandaise espuma, smoked salmon, michelin

winePairings.name: Champagne (e.g., Krug Grande Cuvée)
winePairings.notes: Bright acidity and fine bubbles cut through the richness while complementing the truffle and caviar.

winePairings.name: Chablis or White Burgundy
winePairings.notes: Crisp minerality balances the buttery hollandaise and salmon.

ingredients.item: White truffle oil (or grated fresh black truffle)
Fine sea salt and white pepper

steps.instruction: Set up sous-vide bath to 63.5 °C (146.3 °F). Gently lower the 4 eggs (in shells) into the bath and cook for 45–60 minutes.
steps.note: This yields a silky white and molten custardy yolk.

steps.instruction: Prepare truffle hollandaise base: Whisk 3 egg yolks, lemon juice, salt, and white pepper over a double boiler until pale and ribbon-like. Slowly whisk in warm clarified butter until thick. Stir in truffle oil or grated fresh truffle. Cool to room temperature.
Whip heavy cream to soft peaks. Gently fold in cooled hollandaise. Pour into siphon, charge with two N?O cartridges, shake vigorously, and refrigerate upright for 30 minutes.
Toast brioche until golden. Blanch asparagus in boiling salted water for 90 seconds, shock in ice water, and pat dry.
Warm plates. Place a ring mold on each plate, add toasted brioche, then layer smoked salmon in an elegant rosette.
Carefully crack and slide one sous-vide egg onto the salmon per plate using an offset spatula. Remove ring mold.
Dispense a generous cloud of truffle hollandaise espuma over each egg. Top with a quenelle of Ossetra caviar.

Shave 3–4 paper-thin slices of fresh black truffle directly over the dish. Arrange asparagus spears artistically to the side. Scatter microgreens and edible gold leaf. Add sauce dots for visual rhythm.
